# git-repos

Manages the GitLab groups, projects as code with Terraform

<!-- autogenerated using templates/2-docs/makefile-agents.md.repo.tpl -->
## `./Makefile`

### Docs:

`render-templates` render *.repo.tpl onto the repo (.env, makefile.agents.md, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md)

### Terraform:

`init` init the backend and providers
`fmt` format all terraform files in place
`validate` check formatting and validate the config
`plan` show the plan (writes tf/plan.tfplan for CI)
`apply` apply the saved plan (plan.tfplan)
